overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rainy neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The scene begins at a burning trash pile in an alley, transitions through a dark underpass, and emerges into a wide street with towering holographic billboards and futuristic skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy back alley with burning trash and makeshift camp

events.description: moving past the burning garbage pile, fire moves to the right of frame
passing the red camping tent and approaching the underpass entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past a burning trash pile in a rainy alley, heading toward a dark underpass

entered.detail: large pile of garbage bags engulfed in bright orange flames with smoke rising
chain link fence running behind the burning trash
red fabric camping tent set up on the wet sidewalk
tall concrete building facade with rectangular windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a burning pile of garbage bags in a narrow rainy alley, illuminating the surroundings with flickering orange light. A red camping tent is set up on the left sidewalk near a chain link fence. The camera moves forward past the fire, leaving the flames behind as it approaches a dark underpass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with graffiti-covered concrete walls

events.description: entering the covered underpass, ambient light drops significantly as fire light fades
distant neon lights and holographic signs become visible at the end of the underpass tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit concrete underpass with graffiti-covered walls on the left

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass ceiling and support columns covering the walkway
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
concrete dividers and barriers along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a dark covered underpass, leaving the firelight behind for dim artificial lighting. The left wall is covered in graffiti while concrete barriers line the right. Rain continues to fall outside the sheltered area. Toward the end of the segment, bright neon lights from the city become visible in the distance, signaling the exit from the underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk downtown street with towering holographic advertisements

events.description: emerging from the underpass into the open street with full view of neon cityscape
turning right to pan across the expansive city skyline and holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through the open street and turning to admire the towering neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: massive buildings covered in bright neon advertisements, holographic displays, and Japanese kanji signage
towering skyscraper with illuminated glass facade and multiple holographic projections
futuristic cars parked along the right side of the wet street
rusted metal railing running along the edge of the elevated sidewalk
expansive view of the cyberpunk cityscape with numerous illuminated towers and neon signs

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the underpass into a wide open street, revealing a breathtaking cyberpunk cityscape. Towering skyscrapers covered in massive neon holographic billboards dominate the skyline, casting colorful reflections on the rain-soaked pavement. The camera turns right to pan across the panoramic view of the illuminated downtown area, with parked vehicles visible along the street and metal railings lining the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, fire-lit alleyway into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city. It begins by passing a burning pile of garbage bags and a red camping tent, with flickering orange light illuminating the rainy narrow passage. As the camera moves forward, the warmth of the fire fades and the scene shifts into a dim, concrete underpass lined with graffiti and barriers. The environment then opens up as the camera emerges from the shelter, transitioning from the shadows into a wide street dominated by towering skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards. Finally, the camera pans right to reveal a panoramic view of the illuminated downtown area, where colorful lights reflect off the rain-soaked pavement and parked vehicles.
